Bill, here's a quick look at your O.H. Ivie trip. We've got two home rentals — one just 3 minutes from Elm Creek Marina, and a nicer 4-bedroom about 30 minutes out near Hwy 67. Both have great boat parking. Scroll down to compare and tap the one you like.

Next: Option A — 3 Min to Marina
Option A · 3 Min to Elm Creek Marina
Lakeside Home · Voss
Voss, TX · 3 minutes from Elm Creek Marina & Boat Ramps
Bill, this home is about as close to the water as you can get — just a 3-minute drive to Elm Creek Marina and the paved boat ramps. Great space for your boat and trailer in a quiet, safe area. A comfortable base camp that gets you on the water fast every morning. Tap the price bar below to select this one.
ENTIRE HOME · 4 NIGHTS

from$749.00

Home icon shows property location — right next to Elm Creek Marina on the east shore
Type
Entire Home Rental
Drive to Marina
~3 minutes to Elm Creek
Boat Parking

Best For
Proximity to water · convenience
Entire Home Boat & Trailer Parking 3 Min to Marina Kitchen Quiet Setting Front Porch
A comfortable home right in Voss, steps from the lake. Elm Creek Marina's paved boat ramps, bait shop, and restaurant are a 3-minute drive. The property sits on a quiet lot with plenty of room for your boat and trailer.
Agent's Note This is the pick if getting on the water quickly each morning is the priority. At 3 minutes to the marina, you're practically there. The home is smaller but perfectly comfortable for two — and at $749 for 4 nights, it's $414 less than Option B. Boat parking is safe and secure in a quiet rural setting.
Next: Option B — Blue Roof House
Option B · Nicest Home · Most Space
Blue Roof House
Near Valera, TX · Off Hwy 67 · ~30 min to Elm Creek Marina
Bill, this is the nicer property — a spacious 4-bedroom home with beautiful interiors. It's about 30 minutes from Elm Creek Marina, up near Valera off Hwy 67, so you'll add some drive time each day. But you're coming back to a really comfortable place every evening. Great boat parking here too. Tap below to select.
ENTIRE HOME · 4 NIGHTS

Blue Roof House is near Valera off Hwy 67 — about 30 minutes north of Elm Creek Marina

Entire Home · 4 Bedrooms

Boat Parking

Best For

4 Bedrooms Entire Home Boat & Trailer Parking Beautiful Interior Full Kitchen Spacious Living Areas
A beautifully finished 4-bedroom home near Valera off Hwy 67. The living areas and master suite are a clear step above — more space and comfort than you need for two, but a genuinely nice place to unwind after a day on the water.
Agent's Note This is the comfort upgrade. The interiors are noticeably nicer — see the living room and master bedroom above. The trade-off is the 30-minute drive to Elm Creek each way, which adds about an hour to your fishing day. At $1,163 for 4 nights it's $414 more than Option A. Both have excellent boat parking — the decision comes down to proximity vs. comfort.
